contentBlocks.title: Why convert JSON to CSV?
contentBlocks.html:
JSON is a widely used file format with broad compatibility across devices and software. However, depending on your use case, converting to CSV can offer significant advantages — whether it's smaller file sizes, better quality preservation, broader platform support, or specific feature requirements.

This free online converter transforms your JSON files into CSV format directly in the browser. No files are uploaded to any server — the entire conversion process happens locally on your device using modern browser APIs. This means your data stays private and secure at all times.

You can convert as many files as you need with no daily limits, no registration, and no watermarks. Simply drag and drop your files, adjust quality settings if available, and download the results individually or all at once.

contentBlocks.title: How much can you save by converting JSON to CSV?
contentBlocks.html:
Savings depend on the source file type and its original compression. Below are example results:

Camera photo

2.4 MB → 890 KB

Saving: ~63%

Product image

500 KB → 185 KB

Saving: ~63%

Screenshot / banner

350 KB → 230 KB

Saving: ~34%

Actual savings may vary depending on image content and quality settings. The converter shows the exact size before and after conversion for each file.

contentBlocks.title: Tips for converting JSON to CSV
contentBlocks.description: A few tips to help you avoid common issues during conversion:

items.title: Very large files
items.description: Converting images above 4000×4000 pixels may be slower and strain the browser. If processing many large files, consider splitting them into batches of 10–20.

items.title: Already compressed files
items.description: If the original JSON file was already heavily compressed, converting to CSV may not yield significant size savings. Try different quality settings.

items.title: Transparency
items.description: The CSV format does not support transparency. Transparent areas will be replaced with a white background. Consider PNG or WebP for transparency.

items.title: Keep your originals
items.description: Lossy conversion is irreversible. Keep copies of original JSON files so you can re-convert with different settings if needed.

contentBlocks.title: Frequently asked questions about JSON to CSV conversion

items.question: Is converting JSON to CSV free?
items.answer: Yes, this converter is completely free with no limits. No registration, no watermarks.

items.question: Does the converter upload my files?
items.answer: No. All processing happens locally in your browser. Your files never leave your device.

items.question: Can I convert multiple files at once?
items.answer: Yes, the converter supports batch conversion. Add multiple files and convert them all simultaneously.

items.question: Does the converter work on mobile?
items.answer: Yes, the converter works on any device with a modern web browser, including smartphones and tablets.

items.question: Is converting JSON to CSV safe for my files?
items.answer: Yes. All conversion happens locally in your browser using the Canvas API. Files are never sent to any external server. When you close the page, data is automatically cleared.

items.question: Can I convert multiple JSON files at once?
items.answer: Yes. The tool supports batch conversion with no file limit. Drag all files onto the converter or select them from your device.

items.question: Is CSV supported by all browsers?
items.answer: The CSV format is widely supported by modern browsers: Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge, and Opera.
